display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Tracy, Loren, Eli and Alyssa compete.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: BFFs Anna and Phalynn take on couple Paolo and Paola on.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Three new contestants compete.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Engaged couple Turner and Shelby representing Northglenn, Colo., participate in a face-off with the wall; a special guest makes an appearance.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: A new batch of contestants tries to avoid the WHAMMY and bring home a million bucks.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: The Smaha family and the Stapleton family compete against each other, trying to guess the answers.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts the network's new season of the long-running classic, in which two families compete to guess the answers to various surveys.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sisters Jada and Mesa duel besties Katheryn and Sumi.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Brittany, Phillip, Latricia, and Kristi.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Reilly family vs. Blackstone family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Rachel Dratch, Chris Redd, Dr. Oz and Daphne Oz.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A Minnesota woman tries her luck at the million dollar prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from Newark, N.J., competes in hopes of winning money so he can buy his dream car.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties challenge! Jessika and Amanda take on Dean and Patti.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: James Holzhauer takes his seat as the chaser.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Mother-son duo Yvonne and Jakob representing Fort Carson, Colo., and Washington, D.C., respectively, take on the wall in hopes of winning big.

programme.title: World of FreeSports

programme.desc: Lejonen v Vasternik.

programme.title: United Rugby Championship
programme.desc: Stormers v Cardiff in a quarter-final tie.

programme.title: Sporting Countdowns
programme.desc: Focusing on some of the most memorable moments in sports history.

programme.title: International Football
programme.desc: USA v Senegal.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Learn why Indiana's Aiden Fisher wears the number four. Get to know Rutgers kicker Jai Patel. See why Wisconsin's Ricardo Hallman never wavered during his career with the Badgers.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: David Olano kicked a 41-yard field goal as time expired to lift the 23rd-ranked Fighting Illini to a 34-32 victory over the 21st-ranked Trojans. From Sept. 27, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Julian Sayin's journey to becoming Ohio State's starting quarterback. Get to know wide receiver Jeremiah Smith. Plus, highlights from the Buckeyes' victory over the Wolverines.

programme.title: Ohio State Football Classic
programme.desc: Will Howard passed for two touchdowns and Quinshon Judkins rushed for 100 yards and two touchdowns to help the 8th-ranked Buckeyes defeat the 7th-ranked Fighting Irish, 34-23, to win the program's sixth national title. From Jan. 20, 2025.

programme.title: Michigan Football Classic
programme.desc: Blake Corum and Donovan Edwards rushed for a combined 238 yards and four touchdowns to help lead the top-ranked Wolverines to victory over the 2nd-ranked Huskies and capture the program's first national championship since 1997. From Jan. 8, 2024.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: See why Fernando Mendoza chose Indiana to further develop his skills as a quarterback. Learn why Aiden Fisher wears the number four and Elijah Sarratt's journey to becoming a top receiver. Plus, highlights from the Hoosiers' 2025 season.

programme.title: Indiana Football Classic
programme.desc: Fernando Mendoza passed for 222 yards and a touchdown in the 2nd-ranked Hoosiers' 13-10 victory over the top-ranked Buckeyes to claim Indiana's first Big Ten Championship since 1967. From Dec. 6, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: See how Iowa's Kamari Moulton transformed loss into on-field gains. Learn how Hank Beatty has become a stand-out receiver at Illinois. Discover what prepared Oregon's Dante Moore for success.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Atticus Sappington kicked the game-winning field goal with three seconds remaining to lift the 9th-ranked Ducks to an 18-16 victory over the 20th-ranked Hawkeyes. From Nov. 8, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: UCLA Football Classic
programme.desc: Nico Iamaleava passed for two touchdowns and ran in 3 more scores to lead the Bruins to a 42-37 upset victory over the 7th-ranked Nittany Lions. From Oct. 4, 2025.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: Jayden Maiava threw for 265 yards and two touchdowns to help the Trojans beat the 15th-ranked Wolverines, 31-13. From Oct. 11, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: Washington Football Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 20, 2025.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Dante Moore passed for three touchdowns to help the 6th-ranked Ducks beat the 3rd-ranked Nittany Lions 30-24 in double-overtime. From Sept. 27, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: King Miller rushed for 129 yards and ran in the game-winning touchdown to lift the 23rd-ranked Trojans to a 21-17 victory over the Cornhuskers. From Nov. 1, 2025.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Ludwig Field in College Park, Md.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From U-M Soccer Stadium in Ann Arbor, Mich.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Pape' Field in Eugene, Ore.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Ludwig Field in College Park, Md.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Hear from head coach Sasho Cirovski, Sebastian Elney, Chase Gasper and more as they re-live Elney's game-winning goals that secured Maryland wins over rival UCLA in 2015 and 2017.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: Second Semifinal.

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: Hear from Michigan State's Brandon Munson. Michele Dalton returns home to Wisconsin. See how Julia and Grace Raich inspire inclusion at Penn State. Meet Ohio State's Jacinda and Jadin Bonham.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Jesse Owens Memorial Stadium in Columbus, Ohio.

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: See how passion for playing soccer runs in the family for USC's Faith George. Hear the story of Chiara Singarella's journey from Argentina. Learn how goalkeeper Mia Hamant is continuing to inspire others. Coach Tracy Joyner and the Oregon Ducks.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington, Ind.

programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Arsenal.

programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.desc: A look back at some of Divock Origi's greatest goals.

programme.title: Bobby Doc
programme.desc: From the humble origins of his hometown in Brazil to the height of success with the Reds, this 'LFC Originals¿ documentary maps the life of samba star Roberto Firmino.

programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Arsenal.

programme.title: Cup Kings
programme.desc: Enjoy back-to-back to back highlights of Liverpool¿s previous seven FA Cup Final triumphs.

programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: What LFC Means to Me
programme.desc: Former Liverpool star Kevin Keegan speaks exclusively to LFCTV about his feelings for the club.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Fernando Torres scored for the Reds.

programme.title: Sixty Minutes
programme.desc: Considered one of Gerard Houllier's greatest ever signings, Gary McAllister will always be remembered fondly by fans. In this edition of Sixty Minutes he talks about his illustrious career.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Burnley.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: 2026 Stanley Cup Final
programme.desc: The Hurricanes and Golden Knights clash in Game 1 of the best-of-seven Stanley Cup Final. Carolina brings a stellar 12-1 playoff record into the series, while Vegas responds with a 12-5 postseason mark after sweeping its prior round.

programme.title: NHL Now
programme.desc: A front row seat to the news and happenings from around the league, as hosts E.J. Hradek and Jackie Redmond, along with NHL Insiders, set up for a night of NHL game action.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: A Day That Changed the Game
programme.desc: The NHL expands from six to 12 teams and paves the way for television rights and growth to the game of hockey.

programme.title: Top Shelf
programme.desc: This show fills in the gaps and keeps fans abreast of the latest eye-popping moves, tricks and stops so that they can rest assured that they haven't missed a thing.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Tracy, Loren, Eli and Alyssa compete.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: BFFs Anna and Phalynn take on couple Paolo and Paola on.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Three new contestants compete.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Engaged couple Turner and Shelby representing Northglenn, Colo., participate in a face-off with the wall; a special guest makes an appearance.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: A new batch of contestants tries to avoid the WHAMMY and bring home a million bucks.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: The Smaha family and the Stapleton family compete against each other, trying to guess the answers.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts the network's new season of the long-running classic, in which two families compete to guess the answers to various surveys.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sisters Jada and Mesa duel besties Katheryn and Sumi.

programme.title: Family Feud

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Rachel Dratch, Chris Redd, Dr. Oz and Daphne Oz.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A Minnesota woman tries her luck at the million dollar prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A man from Newark, N.J., competes in hopes of winning money so he can buy his dream car.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The KLM Open's opening round of the European Swing begins at The International in Amsterdam. Defending champion Connor Syme of Scotland returns to compete, while former Dutch soccer star Ronald de Boer is scheduled to hit the ceremonial opening shot.

programme.desc: From Thornblade Club in Greer, S.C.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan using other popular sports to lower your golf scores.

programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan to add more distance with the driver.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan to start making consistent solid contact.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Top PGA professionals tee off during the opening round of the Memorial Tournament. A premier 72-player field takes on the demanding course at Muirfield Village Golf Club, using sharp driving accuracy to set the competitive baseline.

programme.title: 2026 NBA Finals
programme.desc: The Spurs and the Knicks go head-to-head for Game 1 of the 2026 NBA Finals at Frost Bank Center. The Knicks have dominated the Eastern Conference bracket with an 11-game win streak, while the Spurs sit in first place in the Western Conference.
